zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Andrew Fraser of Touchfraser於大約1240年出生在蘇格蘭斯林史爾圖時，他的父親Gilbert Fraser33歲，母親Christian Lascelles37歲。他於1270年之前與Beatrix Cheyne在蘇格蘭斯林史爾結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1308年在蘇格蘭斯林史爾享年69歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭斯林史爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Andrew Fraser of Touchfraser于大约1240年出生在苏格兰斯林史爾圖时，他的父亲Gilbert Fraser33岁，母亲Christian Lascelles37岁。他于1270年之前与Beatrix Cheyne在苏格兰斯林史爾结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1308年在苏格兰斯林史爾享年69岁，埋葬在苏格兰斯林史爾。

nameMeanings.name: Fraser
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: apparently a nickname from Anglo-Norman French fraser(e), fresere ‘strawberry plant’. Fresel and Frisel, from Anglo-Norman French fresel ‘strawberry’, are early variants of the Fraser surname, the modern Gaelicized form of which is Friseal. See Frizzell . The crest on the Scottish family's coat of arms takes the form of a strawberry plant, but its antiquity is unknown. Claims of a habitational derivation, in particular from a place called la Frézelière in Anjou (France), are attractive but they lack verifiable evidence.
Americanized form of one or more similar (like-sounding) Jewish surnames.

History: There are two clans Fraser in Scotland, with common ancestry going back to Simon Fraser of Keith in East Lothian, who lived in the 12th century. One of these clans has its seat at Philorth Castle (subsequently re-named Cairnbulg) on the northeast coast of Scotland. Sir Alexander Fraser, 8th laird of Philorth (c. 1536–1623) converted the fishing village of Faithlie into the burgh of Fraserburgh in the 1590s. The other clan is Fraser of Lovat, associated mainly with the city of Inverness are. They are descended from Simon Fraser, a younger son, who lived in the early 14th century. In Gaelic, the head of Clan Fraser of Lovat is known as Mac Shimi ‘son of Simon’.

variants.name: Frayser
meanings: Probably an altered form of   Fraser  .

variants.name: Frasier
meanings: Scottish and northern Irish: variant of   Fraser  .

variants.name: Frazer
meanings: Variant of   Fraser  , associated chiefly with northern Ireland.

variants.name: Frashier
meanings: Scottish and northern Irish: variant of   Fraser  .

variants.name: Frizzell
meanings: English and Irish: nickname from Old French fresel, frisel ‘lace, ribbon, braid, brooch, frill, ruff’, for someone with an ornate style of dress, or ‘object of little value’ (a diminutive of frese, of ancient Germanic origin).
Scottish: from Anglo-Norman French fresel ‘strawberry’, an alternative form of Fraser .

variants.name: Frazier
meanings: English and Scottish: variant of   Fraser  .

variants.name: Frasher
meanings: Scottish and northern Irish: variant of   Fraser  .
Possibly an altered form of German Fratzscher (see Frutchey ).

nameMeanings.name: Andrew
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the Greek name Andreas, a short form of any of various compound names derived from andr- ‘man, warrior’. In the New Testament this is the name of the first disciple to be called by Jesus. After the Resurrection, St Andrew preached in Asia Minor and Greece. He is traditionally believed to have been crucified at Patras in Achaia. He was one of the most popular saints of the Middle Ages and was adopted as the patron of Scotland, Russia, and Greece. It has long been among the most popular boys' names in the English-speaking world, especially in Scotland. Its popularity in England was further enhanced by its use as a British royal name for Prince Andrew ( b. 1960 ), the Duke of York.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Andrew Fraser of Touchfraser was born about 1240, in Touch, Stirlingshire, Scotland, his father, Gilbert Fraser, was 33 and his mother, Christian Lascelles, was 37. He married Beatrix Cheyne before 1270, in Stirlingshire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1308, in Stirlingshire, Scotland, at the age of 69, and was buried in Stirlingshire, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Andrew Fraser of Touchfraser est né environ 1240, à Touch, Stirlingshire, Écosse, son père, Gilbert Fraser, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Christian Lascelles, avait 37 ans. Il a épousé Beatrix Cheyne avant 1270, à Stirlingshire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1308, à Stirlingshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 69 ans, et a été enterré à Stirlingshire, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Andrew Fraser of Touchfraser um 1240 in Touch, Stirlingshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Gilbert Fraser 33 und seine Mutter Christian Lascelles 37. Er hat vor 1270 in Stirlingshire, Scotland Beatrix Cheyne geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1308 im Alter von 69 Jahren in Stirlingshire, Scotland und wurde in Stirlingshire, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Andrew Fraser of Touchfraser è nato il circa 1240 nel Touch, Stirlingshire, Scotland, il suo padre, Gilbert Fraser, aveva 33 anni e il suo madre, Christian Lascelles, aveva 37 anni. Lui sposato Beatrix Cheyne prima del 1270, nel Stirlingshire, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1308, nel Stirlingshire, Scotland, all'età di 69 anni, e fu sepolto a Stirlingshire, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Andrew Fraser of Touchfraserが約1240年にスコットランドスティルリングシュアイアトウチで生まれた時，父Gilbert Fraserは33歳，母Christian Lascellesは37歳であった。1270年以前にスコットランドスティルリングシュアイアでBeatrix Cheyneと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1308年にスコットランドスティルリングシュアイアで69歳で死去し，スコットランドスティルリングシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Andrew Fraser of Touchfraser(이)가 대략 1240년 스컷랜드 스티를링실르 토우치에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Gilbert Fraser(은)는 33세였고, 그의 어머니 Christian Lascelles(은)는 37세였다. 그는 1270년 이전 스컷랜드 스티를링실르에서 Beatrix Cheyne(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1308년 스컷랜드 스티를링실르에서 69세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 스티를링실르에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Andrew Fraser of Touchfraser nasceu aproximadamente 1240, em Touch, Stirlingshire, Scotland, seu pai, Gilbert Fraser, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Christian Lascelles, tinha 37 anos. Ele casou-se com Beatrix Cheyne antes 1270, em Stirlingshire, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1308, em Stirlingshire, Scotland, com 69 anos, e foi sepultado em Stirlingshire, Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Andrew Fraser of Touchfraser родился около 1240 г. в местности тоуч, стирлингшир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Gilbert Fraser было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Christian Lascelles, 37. Он женился на женщине по имени Beatrix Cheyne перед 1270 г. в местности стирлингшир, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1308 г. в местности стирлингшир, Шотландия в возрасте 69 лет и был похоронен в местности стирлингшир, Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Andrew Fraser of Touchfraser nació aproximadamente 1240, en Touch, Stirlingshire, Scotland, su papá, Gilbert Fraser, tenía 33 años y su mamá, Christian Lascelles, tenía 37 años. Se casó con Beatrix Cheyne antes de 1270, en Stirlingshire, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1308, en Stirlingshire, Scotland, a la edad de 69 años, y fue sepultado en Stirlingshire, Scotland.
